patch.value: Fix --no-header: host rejects bare --no- flag as negation of missing --header

pm csv export --no-header (and csv-export export --no-header) failed with 'Unknown option --header' / silently ignored, because the pm host parses --no-X as the negation of a registered --X flag. The export command declared a bare { long: '--no-header' } which the host never matched. Fix: declare the positive --header flag (host now accepts --no-header as its negation, setting header=false) and read ctx.options.header===false in both the command and exporter-capability paths. Added a regression test asserting the export command declares --header not --no-header. Verified end-to-end: --no-header omits the header row, default keeps it; 59/59 tests pass.
